title: Xtra Molten Croatian Cheese Lasagna
description: A tangy and molten Croatian dish featuring shredded Mexican cheese and a mother-sauce base, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and FODMAP friendly.
instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, spinach, egg, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
In a separate bowl, combine the shredded Mexican cheese and mother sauce, and mix well.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a thin layer of the mother sauce.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta cheese mixture over the noodles.
Sprinkle with half of the shredded Mexican cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the remaining ricotta cheese mixture, and finally the remaining Mexican cheese mixture.
Top with the remaining mother sauce and sprinkle with additional cheese if desired.
